# videoRefreshPeriod | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Video ](/documentation/corevideo)

- [ CVTimeStamp ](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestamp)

- [ videoRefreshPeriod ](/documentation/CoreVideo/CVTimeStamp/videoRefreshPeriod)

-  videoRefreshPeriod 

Instance Property# videoRefreshPeriod

iOS 4.0+iPadOS 4.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.4+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
var videoRefreshPeriod: Int64
```

## [See Also](/documentation/CoreVideo/CVTimeStamp/videoRefreshPeriod#see-also)

### [Properties](/documentation/CoreVideo/CVTimeStamp/videoRefreshPeriod#Properties)

[`var flags: UInt64`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestamp/flags)A bit field containing additional information about the timestamp.[`var hostTime: UInt64`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestamp/hosttime)The system time measured by the timestamp.[`var rateScalar: Double`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestamp/ratescalar)The current rate of the device as measured by the timestamps, divided by the nominal rate.[`var reserved: UInt64`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestamp/reserved)Reserved. Do not use.[`var smpteTime: CVSMPTETime`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestamp/smptetime)The SMPTE time representation of the timestamp.[`var version: UInt32`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestamp/version)The current `CVTimeStamp` structure is version 0. Some functions require you to specify a version when passing in a timestamp structure to be filled.[`var videoTime: Int64`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestamp/videotime)The start of a frame (or field for interlaced video).[`var videoTimeScale: Int32`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestamp/videotimescale)The scale (in units per second) of the `videoTimeScale` and `videoRefreshPeriod` fields.
